'''âng-v-r''' ('''kangavar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lichenise|lichenise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lichenise|lichenise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-v-r
|-
! Lemma
| kangavar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingavar|thingavar]] || [[word:jingavar|jingavar]] || [[word:shingavar|shingavar]] || [[word:kingavar|kingavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungavar|thuthungavar]] || [[word:jujungavar|jujungavar]] || [[word:shushungavar|shushungavar]] || [[word:kukungavar|kukungavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungavar|thungavar]] || [[word:jungavar|jungavar]] || [[word:shungavar|shungavar]] || [[word:kungavar|kungavar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungavar|thungavar]] || [[word:jungavar|jungavar]] || [[word:shungavar|shungavar]] || [[word:kungavar|kungavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengavar|thengavar]] || [[word:jengavar|jengavar]] || [[word:shengavar|shengavar]] || [[word:kengavar|kengavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongavar|thothongavar]] || [[word:jojongavar|jojongavar]] || [[word:shoshongavar|shoshongavar]] || [[word:kokongavar|kokongavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongavar|thongavar]] || [[word:jongavar|jongavar]] || [[word:shongavar|shongavar]] || [[word:kongavar|kongavar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongavar|thongavar]] || [[word:jongavar|jongavar]] || [[word:shongavar|shongavar]] || [[word:kongavar|kongavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngavar|thĂŠngavar]] || [[word:jĂŠngavar|jĂŠngavar]] || [[word:shĂŠngavar|shĂŠngavar]] || [[word:kĂŠngavar|kĂŠngavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangavar|thathangavar]] || [[word:jajangavar|jajangavar]] || [[word:shashangavar|shashangavar]] || [[word:kakangavar|kakangavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangavar|thangavar]] || [[word:jangavar|jangavar]] || [[word:shangavar|shangavar]] || [[word:kangavar|kangavar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangavar|thangavar]] || [[word:jangavar|jangavar]] || [[word:shangavar|shangavar]] || [[word:kangavar|kangavar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangavar|shangavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangavar|goshangavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangavar|gokishangavar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangavarnĂŒ|shangavarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangavarnknĂŒ|goshangavarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavarnĂŒ|gokishangavarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangavarshĂ«|shangavarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangavarnkshĂ«|goshangavarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangavarshĂ«|gokishangavarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavaro|shangavaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavarnkro|goshangavarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavaro|gokishangavaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavarmu|shangavarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavarnkmu|goshangavarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavarmu|gokishangavarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangavarsher|shangavarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangavarnksher|goshangavarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangavarsher|gokishangavarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangavarng|shangavarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangavarnkng|goshangavarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangavarng|gokishangavarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangavarya|shangavarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangavarnkya|goshangavarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangavarya|gokishangavarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangavaryam|shangavaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangavarnkyam|goshangavarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangavaryam|gokishangavaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavarnĂŒshĂ«|shangavarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangavarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangavarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavarnĂŒro|shangavarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavarnknĂŒro|goshangavarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavarnĂŒro|gokishangavarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavarnĂŒmu|shangavarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavarnknĂŒmu|goshangavarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavarnĂŒmu|gokishangavarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavarshĂ«nĂŒ|shangavarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangavarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangavarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavarshĂ«ro|shangavarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavarnkshĂ«ro|goshangavarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavarshĂ«ro|gokishangavarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavarshĂ«mu|shangavarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavarnkshĂ«mu|goshangavarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavarshĂ«mu|gokishangavarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavaronĂŒ|shangavaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavarnkronĂŒ|goshangavarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavaronĂŒ|gokishangavaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavaroshĂ«|shangavaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavarnkroshĂ«|goshangavarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavaroshĂ«|gokishangavaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangavaromu|shangavaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangavarnkromu|goshangavarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangavaromu|gokishangavaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangavarmunĂŒ|shangavarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangavarnkmunĂŒ|goshangavarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangavarmunĂŒ|gokishangavarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangavarmushĂ«|shangavarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangavarnkmushĂ«|goshangavarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangavarmushĂ«|gokishangavarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangavarmuro|shangavarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangavarnkmuro|goshangavarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangavarmuro|gokishangavarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
